Title: Salary Negotiation Confidence
Description: Gauge your readiness to negotiate your salary and total compensation, and identify the knowledge or mindset gaps to address first.
SchemaJson: {"id":"salary_confidence_v1","title":"Salary Negotiation Confidence","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"rating","label":"How confident do you feel about negotiating your salary or a job offer?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"choice","label":"Have you ever negotiated a salary, promotion, or job offer?","options":["Yes, successfully","Yes, but it did not go well","I tried but backed down","No, I have never negotiated","I have not had the opportunity"],"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"choice","label":"Do you currently know your market rate for your role and location?","options":["Yes, I have researched it recently","I have a rough idea","I am not sure","No"],"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"rating","label":"How comfortable are you discussing money directly with an employer or manager?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"What makes salary negotiation feel difficult or uncomfortable for you?","required":false}]}
